public enum EntityProcessingType
Members
  Member nameValueDescription
CreateNew0
Load1
Update2
AfterSave3
Delete4
BeforeSave5 Raised after the entites have been modified, but before the changes are committed.
BeforeSaveExtendedData6 Raised before the CommitAsync(IUnitOfWork, CancellationToken) method is called, but before the entities are committed.
